overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through the industrial district of East Los Santos at dusk. The character navigates intersections, passes industrial smokestacks and billboards, and approaches a large stadium structure.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light then crossing the street as the signal changes to green

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt standing on the sidewalk corner

entered.detail: large cylindrical water tower with metal support framework
tall pole with traffic signals showing red
illuminated billboard with orange and red display
low concrete wall running along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a dusk-lit intersection in an industrial area. A large water tower dominates the right side while traffic lights glow red. The character waits briefly before the light turns green, then crosses the street, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt standing on the corner.

events.description: passing parked vehicles along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked sidewalk past parked cars and industrial scenery

entered.detail: twin industrial smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the sky
dark colored pickup truck parked at the curb
wooden utility poles with power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cracked concrete sidewalk through the industrial district, the character passes parked vehicles while industrial smokestacks loom in the distance. The digital billboard recedes into the background as utility poles line the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with billboard and overpass

events.description: crossing the intersection as vehicles pass through
turning right at the intersection corner

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning right onto the next sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large billboard displaying 'EAST LOS SANTOS' text
elevated concrete bridge structure spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large intersection marked by a prominent 'East Los Santos' billboard. After crossing as traffic passes, the character turns right, with a concrete overpass visible ahead and industrial smokestacks now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach to large stadium structure

events.description: approaching the large stadium structure with pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive stadium structure with the enclosed pedestrian overpass

entered.detail: massive industrial stadium building with tall walls and multiple levels
enclosed pedestrian walkway bridge connecting to the stadium
white van parked near the stadium entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the final stretch toward a massive stadium structure, the character approaches an enclosed pedestrian overpass. An abandoned white van sits near the entrance as the industrial surroundings give way to the imposing stadium architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district at dusk that gradually leads toward the imposing architecture of a massive stadium. It begins at a dim intersection dominated by a large water tower, where the character waits for a red light to turn green before crossing past a pedestrian in a red shirt. As the camera moves along a cracked concrete sidewalk, the scene shifts past parked vehicles and receding digital billboards while industrial smokestacks loom increasingly in the distance. The path then opens into another large intersection marked by a prominent East Los Santos billboard, leading the character under a concrete overpass with smokestacks now visible to the left. Finally, the industrial surroundings give way to the stadium's scale as the camera passes an abandoned white van and approaches an enclosed pedestrian overpass.
